claim_boundary: Fast whole-radius scan for workflow timing and radial-shape diagnostics; not a SFINCS_JAX/SFINCS Fortran v3 same-resolution parity claim because the plotted grids differ.

fortran_errorbars.definition: Optional SFINCS Fortran v3 error bars are loaded from an explicit sidecar. When absent, no Fortran uncertainty is plotted or inferred from a single archived run.

performance.memory_definition: JAX: factor+CSR estimate. Fortran: MUMPS effective total across MPI ranks from logs.

memory_peak_mb.definition: Peak over plotted surfaces. JAX uses linear-solver factor plus CSR estimates from HDF5; Fortran v3 uses archived MUMPS effective total factor memory when present.

runtime_total_s.definition: Sum of per-surface solve wall times for the radial points shown in the figure.

resolution_comparison.claim: Do not use JAX-vs-Fortran differences from this payload as a same-resolution parity claim.
